name: Mojito
instructions: Muddle mint and sugar with lime juice. Add rum and top with soda water.

name: Margarita
instructions: Rub rim with lime and salt. Shake ingredients with ice and strain.

name: Old Fashioned
instructions: Muddle sugar with bitters and water, add ice and bourbon. Stir.

name: Dry Martini
instructions: Stir gin and vermouth with ice cubes. Strain into chilled glass. Add olive.

name: Cosmopolitan
instructions: Shake all ingredients with ice. Strain into a chilled glass.

name: Daiquiri
instructions: Shake with ice and strain into a chilled cocktail glass.

name: Whiskey Sour
instructions: Shake with ice. Strain into ice-filled glass. Garnish with cherry.

name: Manhattan
instructions: Stir with ice and strain into a chilled glass. Garnish with cherry.

name: Negroni
instructions: Stir into glass over ice. Garnish with orange peel.

name: Moscow Mule
instructions: Combine vodka and lime juice in a mug. Add ice and ginger beer.

name: Shirley Temple
instructions: Pour ginger ale over ice. Add grenadine. Garnish with cherry.

name: Virgin Mary
instructions: Stir ingredients with ice. Garnish with celery stalk.

name: Virgin Piña Colada
instructions: Blend all ingredients until smooth. Pour into glass.

name: Virgin Mojito
instructions: Muddle mint and sugar. Add lime and ice. Top with soda water.

name: Arnold Palmer
instructions: Fill glass with ice. Fill half with tea and half with lemonade.

name: Roy Rogers
instructions: Pour cola over ice. Add grenadine. Garnish with cherry.

name: Cinderella
instructions: Shake juices with ice. Strain into glass and top with soda water.

name: Safe Sex on the Beach
instructions: Shake nectar and orange juice. Pour over ice. Top with cranberry juice.

name: Pussy Foot
instructions: Shake all ingredients with ice. Strain into a chilled glass.

name: Virgin Sunrise
instructions: Fill glass with ice and orange juice. Slowly pour grenadine over the top.
